prompt: Create Bruno tests for a Stripe-like webhook receiver at POST /webhooks/payment. It requires HMAC-SHA256 signature in X-Webhook-Signature header computed as hex digest of the raw JSON body using the secret from env var WEBHOOK_SECRET. Events: payment.completed, payment.failed, payment.refunded. Returns 400 for invalid JSON, 401 for bad/missing signature, 409 for duplicate event ID. Base URL http://localhost:4000.

assertions.name: hmac-signing-script
assertions.description: Folder-level before-request script computes HMAC-SHA256 using crypto module and WEBHOOK_SECRET env var

assertions.name: event-type-coverage
assertions.description: Separate test files for payment.completed, payment.failed, and payment.refunded

assertions.name: missing-signature-test
assertions.description: Test asserting 401 when X-Webhook-Signature header is missing

assertions.name: wrong-signature-test
assertions.description: Test asserting 401 when signature is invalid

assertions.name: malformed-json-test
assertions.description: Test asserting 400 on malformed/invalid JSON body

assertions.name: duplicate-event-test
assertions.description: Test asserting 409 on duplicate event ID

assertions.name: uses-env-vars
assertions.description: WEBHOOK_SECRET loaded from environment variable, not hardcoded in scripts
